scenarioName: Render QA status in the global report

steps.action: Live Gemini reviewed Render QA status in the global report
steps.targetSurface: Markdown report review and CLI evidence review
steps.expectedResult: The `report.md` file should be available and demonstrate the presence of a compact QA readiness section with all specified fields, a repo-relative link to `qa-evidence-bundle.report.md`, and confirmation that the full QA bundle is not embedded.
steps.observedResult: No `report.md` file was provided, preventing any verification of the expected output.
